name: Annuity Present Worth
description: Convert a series of equal payments to an equivalent present lump sum
identification_signal: Equal payments at regular intervals, find equivalent amount today
frequency: Very Common - appears in 90% of exams

strategy.step_1: Identify A (payment amount), i (rate per period), n (number of payments)
strategy.step_2: Locate P one period before first A (period 0 for ordinary annuity)
strategy.step_3: Use P/A factor or formula to convert series to present worth
strategy.step_4: For annuity due (payments at beginning), multiply result by (1+i)

front.text: Series of equal payments converted to present worth

steps.title: Check Timing
steps.instruction: Verify payments start at period 1 (ordinary) or period 0 (due)

steps.title: Match Periods
steps.instruction: Ensure interest period matches payment period

what_mastery_means: Handle ordinary and annuity due correctly
